solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public boolean divisorGame(int n) {
        return n % 2 == 0;
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The problem can be solved by observing a pattern: if n is even, Alice can always win by choosing 1 on her turn, forcing Bob to face an odd number, and repeating the strategy. If n is odd, Alice will eventually lose if both play optimally. This solution leverages this pattern for constant-time performance.>
